title: CompetencyVerification
description: Verification block attached to every competency-model node and relation. Distinguishes what is merely claimed ('declared') from what is evidenced ('documented' through 'production'). Organizational maturity (competency-maturity.schema.json) is derived from these blocks, so keep 'status' and 'evidence' honest.

status.description: Confidence level of the assertion this block is attached to

source.description: Who or what asserts this (person id, team name, document reference, or tool)

lastChecked.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) the assertion was last verified

evidence.description: Evidence node ids (evidence:*) or external references backing the status
